Instructions
============
- Build: use `build.bat` from an x64 Native Tools VS prompt. Output DLL default is `ripper_new6.dll`; injector defaults to that name. Detours is expected in `C:\detours` (override with `DETOURS_INCLUDE`/`DETOURS_LIB`).
- Inject (GUI): run `AssetRipper.exe`, pick the target process, set DLL path to `ripper_new6.dll`, choose an output directory, click Inject.
- Inject (CLI, early): `AssetRipper.exe --launch "<game.exe>" --dll "<ripper_new6.dll>" --out "<captures>" --args "-force-d3d11 -screen-fullscreen 0 -screen-width 1280 -screen-height 720" --no-overlay [--capture-frame]`.
- Optional throttle (config file in %TEMP%): set `auto_capture_draws=<N>` and `auto_capture_seconds=<S>` to limit auto-capture to N draws per S seconds (use draws=0 to disable).
- Optional frame capture config: set `capture_frame=1` to export the next frame as glTF `.glb`.
- Optional glTF export toggles (config file in %TEMP%):
  - `gltf_flip_z=1`, `gltf_flip_winding=1` (LH -> RH conversion)
  - `gltf_flip_v=0`, `gltf_flip_normal_green=0`, `gltf_flip_tangent_w=0`
  - `gltf_dedup_meshes=1`, `gltf_dedup_textures=1`, `gltf_dedup_samplers=1`
- Controls in target:
  - F9 toggles frame capture (press once to start, press again to finalize; if pending with no draws, F9 cancels), F10 capture once, F11 toggle every-draw capture, F12 request shutdown (also polled in Present).
  - Debug window (auto on inject, toggle via Ctrl+Shift+D) has buttons: Capture Once, Capture Frame, Auto Capture, Stop/Unhook.
  - Captures: OBJ/DDS/DXBC per-draw, plus `frame_####.glb` for full-frame export.
- Closing debug window: it should close on Stop/Unhook or DLL unload. If a stray AssetRipper Debug window remains, force-close with:
  taskkill /F /FI "WINDOWTITLE eq AssetRipper Debug*"

Current target focus
--------------------
- Fears to Fathom - Woodbury Getaway (Unity). Use `-force-d3d11` and the `--launch` CLI for early injection so input layouts are captured.

Drawbacks / past issues
-----------------------
- Hotkeys sometimes blocked; added Present polling and debug buttons as fallback.
- Late injection: mitigated via Present detours, but if the app never calls Present or uses unsupported APIs, hooks will not fire.
- Capture coverage: primary vertex stream + index buffer (range-based), textures via SRV (DX10 DDS with format/mips/arrays), shader bytecode saved as .dxbc; minimal UI filtering; no disassembly.
- Logging: first-start log includes PID, exe path, command line, module presence, and auto-capture throttle settings; indirect draw hooks log once when seen.

Future compatibility improvements
---------------------------------
- Add hooks for more draw calls and contexts (deferred contexts, command lists).
- Broaden texture/shader capture (more SRVs, formats), optional PNG export, shader disassembly.
- Add DX12/Vulkan/OpenGL backends for games not using DX9/11.
